visual_summary: A deserted urban environment characterized by narrow street corridors and building facades. The scale is defined by high-altitude windows positioned at significant heights of 30ft or more. The setting is subject to an extreme cold atmosphere under a nocturnal sky.

lighting: Nocturnal lighting provided by dual Martian moons.
